expected_path_note: exclusion_check=Yes (post-construction services only: maintenance/facility management) -> exit
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 10 – Facility Management Public Buildings Kazakhstan
activities: AstanaServis LLP holds long-term contracts with Kazakh state bodies for the upkeep of completed government buildings in Astana: cleaning, heating and ventilation maintenance, elevator servicing, security staffing and minor repairs. The company does not carry out construction works; it takes over buildings after handover by the construction contractors. All revenue comes from these operation-and-maintenance contracts.
